item.title: First reading, referred to Law & Justice.
item.description: First reading, referred to Law & Justice.

item.title: 👍Bill Bowman - Washington State Court of Appeals
item.description: Bill Bowman signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State Court of Appeals.

item.title: LAW - Majority; 1st substitute bill be substituted, do pass.
item.description: LAW - Majority; 1st substitute bill be substituted, do pass.

item.title: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.
item.description: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.

item.title: Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.
item.description: Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.
item.guid: 2026-02-04/Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.title: Third reading, passed; yeas, 49; nays, 0; absent, 0; excused, 0.
item.description: Third reading, passed; yeas, 49; nays, 0; absent, 0; excused, 0.

item.title: 👍Bill Bowman - Court of Appeals
item.description: Bill Bowman signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Court of Appeals.

item.title: CRJ - Executive action taken by committee.
item.description: CRJ - Executive action taken by committee.

item.title: Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.
item.description: Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.
